MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Case settled by written stipulation of the parties memorialized per the record. Reporter, Joyce Long. Trial date is vacated.

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-24-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-01-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Timothy A. Larsen, Esq. of BRAVO & MARGULIES 512-6700x104 for Plaintiffand opposing party

This matter was called and then recalled at 11:00 a.m. to allow opposing counsel to appear for argument. No appearance by the defense. Therefore, the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- defendant RON MICHELSON's motion for summary judgment is denied -- failure to bear burden of proof re whether the amount of rent was overstated in the 3-Day Notice (per collateral estoppel). Triable issue of fact re proper verification of Complaint. Plaintiff to prepare order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint; P/A; Declartion
Off Calendar Apr-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey Margulies, Esq. of BRAVO & MARGULIES 512-6700 for Plaintiff moving for leave to amend complaint
Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. 433-4800 for defendant RON MICHELSON opposing party

Argued and the Court denied the motion. (JJM/MD) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

Amended Ntc Of Mtn For Leave To Amend Complaint-Unlawful Detainer And Memo Of P&A, And Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-25-2002 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2002 Continued To May-01-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Ron Michelson's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to May 1, 2002, per ex parte order filed on April 23, 2002. (JJM) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Mar-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: A P P E A R A N C E:
Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq. for Plaintiff and opposing party
No appearance by defendant and demurring party. Tentative ruling adopted -- overruled without prejudice to seek stay. Defendant shall have 5 days leave to answer.
(JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
